Now, in slang phrase, sit is up to"
the legislature to frame, in response to
popular demand, a change OF venue, or
change of Judge bill by which a litigant
may evade going before prejudiced
judge, and bill changing the practice
so that the supreme court may review
findings of fact, rendered by trial
judge, as well hs conclusions of law.


Such legislation will not be enacted
without bitter struggle. 1t is to-
be battle to the death between the
Amalagamted on one side and the
Heihze forces and adherents of the
United Copper company on the other.
